sessionName: Z1 easy run 40 min + strides — Achilles-gated; hill-stride debut decision
intro: W7 Mon, Base (§4.C W7): Z1 easy run + strides, no lift. This is the first scheduled hill-stride session — the §3.C/§11.A SI gate is met (3 consecutive clean weeks banked 5/24) and they were held W6 to reset flat-stride cadence (Adj #25).

GATING FLAG — Achilles still reactive (Adj #34). The Sun AM 5/31 24-hour recheck (Adj #43) that decides today's call is not in the log yet — report it (AM no-worse vs worse) before deciding. Recommended default while reactive: HOLD the hill-stride debut and keep mileage ~35 min, not the prescribed 40. Hill strides are concentric calf/Achilles load, and §11.D bars adding a new lower-body NM stressor in the same week as a mileage bump — so defer them until the Achilles is AM-clean, consistent with the calf 335 / soleus holds (Adj #34/#40/#42).

If Sun/this-AM Achilles is no-worse: easy Z1, flat, Vomero Plus, ~35 min, flat strides only (per Adj #25 cadence cap). If worse: cross-train Z1 or shorten, drop strides, and per §11.E flag sharp pain / swelling / sudden weakness (Accutane tendon risk).

flags: ACHILLES GATE (Adj #34/#43): report the Sun AM 5/31 recheck + this morning's status first. No-worse → run the load-managed dose below; worse → cross-train Z1 / shorten, drop strides (Adj #43), escalate per §11.E on sharp pain / swelling / sudden weakness.

HILL STRIDES — HOLD recommended this week. W7 Mon is the scheduled debut (SI gate met) but the Achilles is reactive and W7 is a mileage-ramp week; §11.D = no new lower-body NM exercise the same week as a mileage bump. Defer until Achilles AM-clean. Keep flat strides only if strides are run at all.
MILEAGE: hold ~35 min (do NOT bump to the prescribed 40) while Achilles reactive — mileage held W6 for the same reason (§11.D).
SHOE: Vomero Plus, not the Zoom Fly 6 (Adj #34) — higher stack + 8mm drop = less Achilles dorsiflexion strain. Reserve the carbon/low-drop shoe for short tempo while reactive.
STRIDES (only if Achilles no-worse and you run flat strides): cadence cap ≤180 spm (178–182 band), don't dip pace under ~6:00/mi — rep-3 overshoot to 196 spm has recurred (Adj #25).
Anchor Z1 by pace/RPE, not HR — off-191 zones skew low for running (Adj #9). Run-MHR retest still owed W6–W8 (now W7).
cardio.workout: ~35 min easy continuous, flat, Z1, Vomero Plus (held under the prescribed 40 while Achilles reactive). Hill strides HELD; flat strides 4×20s only if Achilles no-worse, else none.

targets.hr: by pace/RPE not HR (Adj #9); off-191 ≤155 cap is a rower-test artifact

cardio.warmup: 3–5 min walk into easy Z1; built-in, no separate WU.
cardio.cooldown: 5 min easy walk; SI prehab — Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1. Gentle, no aggressive calf stretching on a reactive tendon.
cues: Keep it flat and easy — recovery aerobic, not a pace day
Stop if Achilles soreness turns sharp or worsens mid-run (vs normal easy-run dullness)
Report AM / during / post Achilles + SI status post-session — the AM read drives the hill-stride and mileage calls for the rest of W7

currentLoads.note: 145×5 RIR 0 by mistake, then 140×5/5 RIR 2/1; 140 done at prescribed reps (last set RIR 1, above RPE 7). +5 → 145 next Wed (§5), expect RPE 8-9 — near top of LP, AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W8
145×8/8/8/9 RIR 2/2/1/0 — bumped 140→145, full 4 sets restored (Adj #17 satisfied), clean RIR 1 set 3, set 4 last-set push; bump 150 next
85×8 RIR 0 then 80×8/8 RIR 0/0 — 85 bump to failure, 80 also failure (regressed vs W5 Thu 80×10 clean); long-run-AM fatigue. Adj #18 NOT satisfied (Adj #36)
25×12/12/12/16 RIR 3/3/3/0 — sets 1-3 soft (target RIR 1) + last set 16 reps to failure = light; bump 27.5 (Adj #29)
20×12 RIR 0; 17.5×12/12 RIR 0/0 — 20 bump failed, 17.5 also to failure. User directive: permanently 17.5 until clean (Adj #19 reverted, Adj #37)
55×12/12/10 RIR 2/1/0 — reps improved sets 1-2 (12/12 vs W6 Wed 10/10) but set 3 still failure — hold 55 until clean RIR 1 set 3 (Adj #21/#30 open)
55×12/12/12 RIR 0/0/0 — bumped 52.5→55, reps held but all 3 sets to failure; hold 55 until clean RIR 1 set 3 (Adj #38)
125×15 RIR 2/1 — holding clean since W4 Tue bump; tighter than prior
325×12/9/11 RIR 2/0/0 — Adj #34/#40; 335 bump deferred until Achilles AM-clean; set 1 on target but sets 2-3 ran to failure vs the no-failure instruction
65×12 RIR 4/3/2 — set 3 RIR 2 on target; openers soft → bump-eligible 70 next if set 3 ≥RIR 2 (Adj #32)
BW×12 ×3 — progressed 10→12 reps (Adj #41 satisfied); add load or progress further next
Skipped W6 Sat (Adj #42); keep 60s × 3, Adj #31 deepen-knee/add-load DEFERRED until Achilles AM-clean (Adj #34) — isometric is tendon-friendly
